problem_statement:
A line of N kids is standing there. The rating values listed in the integer array ratings are assigned to each kid.
These kids are receiving candy according to the following criteria:

examples.explanation: The distribution of candies will be 2, 1, 2 to the first, second, and third child respectively.
The distribution of candies will be 1, 2, 1 to the first, second, and third child respectively.The third gets only 1 candy because it satisfies both conditions mentioned above.
